text_original: I love the flow of text. the stories are excellent, memory is good (its always going to be an issue with any of these bots so I dont count it against it.)
text_zh: 我喜欢文字的流畅感。故事非常精彩，记忆力也不错（记忆力对这类机器人来说总是个问题，所以我不会因此给它差评）。
reply_original: Wow, reading your message just made our entire team's day! We are thrilled to hear that you are enjoying the story flow and find the memory performance reliable. It is truly an honor to be part of your creative journey. If you ever have suggestions or need help, feel free to reach out at support@fantachat.ai. Thanks for being awesome!
reply_zh: 哇，读到您的留言让我们整个团队都开心极了！听到您喜欢故事的流畅度并觉得记忆性能稳定可靠，我们感到非常激动。能成为您创作旅程的一部分，我们深感荣幸。如果您有任何建议或需要帮助，请随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 联系我们。感谢您的支持，您太棒了！
